revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni)]][[ja:広瀬神社 (伊豆の国市)]] {{Expand Japanese|広瀬神社 (伊豆の国市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hirose Shrine (Izunokuni) | native_name = 広瀬神社 | image = Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni), haiden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hirose Shrine (Izunokuni) | coordinates = {{coord|35.010611|138.946167}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hirose Shrine (Izunokuni)'''|広瀬神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == postal code (P281) == * 410-2315https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2080105001677https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Commons category (P373) == * Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni) == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Hiroseno Shrine|lt=Hiroseno Shrine|qid=Q135039671|1=Hiroseno Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県伊豆の国市田京1-1', 'language': 'ja'}https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html {{commons category|Category:Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni)}} [[JA:広瀬神社 (伊豆の国市)]] {{wikidata link|Q111776816}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Hirose Shrine |画像 = [[File:Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni), haiden.jpg|250px]]
Haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Izunokuni|Q863758|qid=Q863758|1=Izunokuni}}Takyo 1-1 |位置 = {{Coord|35|0|38.2|N|138|56|46.2|E|region:JP-22_scale:10000_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Tamakushi-hime|Q11572681|qid=Q11572681|lt=Shimomizo-ki-hime|1=Tamakushi-hime}}, plus two other deities (names unknown) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=kensha|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 3 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Hirose Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|0|38.2|N|138|56|46.2|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|35|0|38.2|N|138|56|46.2|E}}}} }} '''Hirose Shrine''' (ひろせじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Takyo, {{ill|lt=Izunokuni|Q863758|qid=Q863758|1=Izunokuni}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and its former rank under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=kensha|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}. === History === According to a 1596 ridgepole inscription, it was moved during Tenpyō years (729-749) from Fukuda-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Iyo Province|Q907829|qid=Q907829|1=Iyo Province}}'Tōshū Shikō,' section on Fukuzawa Myōjin. The 'National Comprehensive Survey of Shrine Rites and Festivals' gives 733 as the founding year. It is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small) "Hirose Shrine" in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Shizuoka Prefecture Japanese History Education Research Group (ed.), 'Historical Walks of Shizuoka Prefecture (Historical Walk 22),' Yamakawa Publishing, 2006, p.59. It burned in military fire during the {{ill|lt=Siege of Odawara|Q2622890|qid=Q2622890|lt=Odawara campaign|1=Siege of Odawara (1590)}} of 1590, but was rebuilt in 1596. Its enshrined deity {{ill|lt=Tamakushi-hime|Q11572681|qid=Q11572681|lt=Shimomizo-ki-hime|1=Tamakushi-hime}} is the consort of {{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, deity of {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|qid=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}}. It is said to have been temporarily enshrined here during Mishima Taisha's later transfer, and the two shrines remain closely connected. Every year on November 3 an annual grand festival is held, where {{ill|lt=Sanbasō|Q11356796|qid=Q11356796|1=Sanbasō}} is performed[https://www.city.izunokuni.shizuoka.jp/tosikei/documents/2-7nirayama-oohito.pdf Historical character seen in shrine festivals and Sanbasō in Nirayama/Ōhito area] - Izunokuni City Urban Planning Division, and six {{ill|lt=festival floats|Q11470974|qid=Q11470974|1=Matsuri float}} from local districts are operated. Float operation was canceled in {{ill|lt=2020|Q25337|qid=Q25337|1=2020}} (Reiwa 2) due to the spread of COVID-19. It resumed in {{ill|lt=2023|Q49622|qid=Q49622|1=2023}} (Reiwa 5), but due to lack of experience one float overturned, causing an accident with 19 dead or injured{{Cite web |url=https://www.sankei.com/article/20231103-Z4WCFJ6QX5NOHFVRYUZCAKBYKI/ |title="Could not stop" festival float overturns, 1 dead and 18 injured |publisher=Sankei Shimbun |date=2023-11-03 |accessdate=2023-11-13}}. In the {{ill|lt=precincts|Q11429002|qid=Q11429002|1=keidai}} stands a poem monument of local {{ill|lt=poet|Q11122954|qid=Q11122954|1=Waka poet}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hozumi Tadashi|1=UNKNOWN}}. Tadashi was a disciple of {{ill|lt=Orikuchi Shinobu|Q3482286|qid=Q3482286|1=Shinobu Orikuchi}} and {{ill|lt=Kitahara Hakushū|Q1066026|qid=Q1066026|1=Hakushū Kitahara}}. His son is actor {{ill|lt=Hozumi Takanobu|Q3546305|qid=Q3546305|1=Takanobu Hozumi}}. === Precinct === File:Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni), honden.jpg|Honden File:Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni), soreisha.jpg|Ancestral spirit shrine File:Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni), kusu.jpg|Great sacred camphor tree (Izunokuni City designated natural monument) File:Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni), torii.jpg|Precinct torii File:Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni), otorii.jpg|Great torii === Cultural properties === === Izunokuni City designated cultural properties === * Natural monument ** Grove of Hirose Shrine * Intangible folk cultural property ** Shiki Sanban === Access === * 7 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Takyo Station|Q7678674|qid=Q7678674|1=Takyō Station}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === Bibliography === *Shizuoka Prefecture Japanese History Education Research Group (ed.), 'Historical Walks of Shizuoka Prefecture (Historical Walk 22),' Yamakawa Publishing, 2006 === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Hirose-jinja (Izunokuni)}} {{Pref-stub|pref=静岡県}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hirose Shrine (Izunokuni)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hirose Shrine (Izunokuni)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hirose Shrine (Izunokuni)]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Izunokuni]] [[Category:伊豆の国市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]]
